metadata.task_title: Convert a file (Excel) into a CSV file
metadata.instruction: Export the Task ID 59.xlsx in Documents > Task 59 folder to .csv and move it to Desktop.
metadata.context: I need to convert and export the Books Excel spreadsheet.

l3.rationale: Win key begins opening the system/start surface needed to launch Run.

l4.rationale: Opens the Run dialog and uses it to launch File Explorer, beginning the path to the Documents folder.

l5.rationale: Navigates through the app and confirms the Task 59 Excel file before working on it.

l3.rationale: Alt begins opening the File/backstage controls.

l4.rationale: Navigates through Excel's File > Export area to inspect export options, then cancels back to the workbook without exporting from that page.

l5.rationale: Uses spreadsheet menus and export dialogs to choose CSV and save the workbook.
